description: Expected outcomes for svault import pipeline tests

scenarios.scenario: normal import with EXIF date and Apple device
EXIF date present, no Make/Model → device=Unknown
no EXIF — dest path uses mtime fallback

scenarios.note: Must be imported AFTER apple_with_exif.jpg to trigger DB dedup

scenarios.scenario: Samsung device — model already starts with 'Samsung', no duplication
Model starts with Make — device should be 'Apple iPhone 14', not 'Apple Apple iPhone 14'

chaos_scenarios.action: Rename chaos/renamed_after_import.jpg to a new name before importing
chaos_scenarios.expected: Still detected as duplicate (same CRC32C + strong hash), not re-imported

chaos_scenarios.action: Move file into subdirectory within source, then import
chaos_scenarios.expected: Still found by VFS walk, imported correctly
Hash error logged, status=failed, file NOT written to DB

chaos_scenarios.action: Agent adds/deletes files from source dir while import runs
chaos_scenarios.expected: Import completes without crash; missing files counted as failed

chaos_scenarios.action: Run import twice on the same source directory
chaos_scenarios.expected: Second run: all files classified as LikelyCacheDuplicate, imported=0
